description: An ICE graphic on a mottled dark-blue background, styled as scattered white-bordered snapshots with handwritten-style captions in a marker font. Three angled photos: (top-left, large) a portrait or booking photo of a bearded Black man in a shirt, tie and vest captioned 'IAN ANDRE ROBERTS SEPT. 26, 2025'; (top-right) a close-up photo of a black semi-automatic handgun in a holster lying on dark fabric, captioned 'LOADED HANDGUN FOUND IN VEHICLE SEPT. 26, 2025'; (bottom-right) an older gray-background police mugshot of the same man with longer hair, captioned 'IAN ANDRE ROBERTS FEBRUARY 2020.' The lower left bears the DHS/ICE seal with 'ICE,' a red banner reading 'LEARN MORE,' and the URL 'ICE.gov/newsroom.' The tweet text identifies Roberts as the Des Moines Public Schools superintendent, 'a criminal illegal alien from Guyana,' arrested with a loaded handgun, cash and a knife.
notable_text: IAN ANDRE ROBERTS SEPT. 26, 2025; LOADED HANDGUN FOUND IN VEHICLE; IAN ANDRE ROBERTS FEBRUARY 2020; ICE LEARN MORE ICE.gov/newsroom
